description.value:
Prerequisite: Can only be taken as a first level heroic character. Relevant ability score 13+.

Benefit: Choose a technique type (Chakra Control, Fuinjutsu, Genjutsu, Ninjutsu or Taijutsu). When learning techniques of that type, you can learn techniques of a Rank 1 higher than normal, and you gain a +2 bonus to Learn checks. You count as 5 years older when meeting requirements or determining your age category (max age 15). In addition, your Reputation in your home village is increased by 2.

Special: You can select this feat more than once. Choose a different technique type every time you do. The age reductions do not stack. (Optional: Your GM may decide to have Genius Ninja apply to all technique types)
